compiled_state.title: UPDATE: Wire github-bootstrap.sh into onboarding SKILL.md Batch Group 5
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Update plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md to call github-bootstrap.sh as part of Batch Group 5 (hook-install).

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md

## Integration Point
Add a new subsection 'GitHub Repository Configuration' within Batch Group 5 (hook-install), AFTER the Ticket Smoke Test section (around line 1540) and BEFORE the Generate Test Index section.

## Acceptance Criteria
- SKILL.md Batch Group 5 includes a GitHub Repository Configuration subsection
- Subsection calls: bash "$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/onboarding/github-bootstrap.sh"
- Skip-guard documented: if no gh CLI or not a git repo, github-bootstrap.sh handles fail-open internally
- Subsection displays message to user: 'Configuring GitHub repository with CI workflow and Ruleset enforcement...'
- Ordering: this step runs AFTER ticket system init (chicken-and-egg requires workflow already committed to main by Batch Group 4)
- No new batch group created — stays within existing Batch Group 5

## Testing Mode
testing_mode: UPDATE

## Dependencies
Must be created after 5399-a828 (GREEN implementation). Script must exist before SKILL.md references it.

comments.body:
PLAN_REVIEW_CORRECTIONS:

Use section HEADING as anchor for insertion, not line number (line numbers drift as file is edited).

Correct insertion anchor: After the closing code block of section '#### Ticket Smoke Test', before section '#### Generate Test Index'.

Use this exact heading text to anchor the Edit: '#### Generate Test Index' — insert the new GitHub Repository Configuration subsection immediately BEFORE that heading.
comments.author: Test
